observed_anomaly_cues: Surface irregularity consistent with threading fault
Visual pattern suggesting loose thread or fiber
Localized deviation from normal grid appearance
mechanism_explanation: Thread forming tool wear or misalignment produces defective threads.
severity_visual_description: minor loose thread or fiber visible under inspection lighting
corrective_action: Replace threading die and adjust feed rate.
counterfactual_prediction: After correction, the loose thread or fiber would be absent and surface appears normal.
